description: It helps identify and analyze features located within a specified distance from a selected point, line, polygon, or existing layer.
Open the Proximity Analysis tool from the Analytics Tools panel.

subdescription: Identifies features completely within the specified distance.
Identifies features that lie within or intersect the specified distance.

description: Enter the required Distance and select the appropriate Unit.
Select the Target Layer Type to continue with the required workflow.
Select the required Target Layer Type to perform proximity analysis.

subdescription: Select 'Model' under Target Layer Type.
Choose the required layer from the Select Layer dropdown.
Under Select Class, choose either a specific model class or All Classes.
Under Proximity Source, select one of the following:
Current Location
Select Location
Select by Location
Click Allow on the notification popup to access your location.
Under Selection Type, select Point, Line, or Polygon.
Draw the selected geometry on the map as indicated by the on-screen hint.
Select feature from the map.
Select 'Annotate' under Target Layer Type.
Choose the required annotation layer from the Select Layer dropdown.
Under Select Class, choose either a specific annotation class or All Classes.
Under Proximity Source, select one of the following:
Current Location
Select Location
Select by Feature
Click Allow on the notification popup to access your location.
Under Selection Type, select Point, Line, or Polygon.
Draw the selected geometry on the map as indicated by the on-screen hint.
Select feature from the map.
Select 'Vector' under Target Layer Type.
Choose the required vector layer from the Select Layer dropdown.
Select the Attribute Column from the vector layer.
Under Select Class, choose the required attribute value from the selected column.
Under Proximity Source, select one of the following:
Current Location
Select Location
Select by Feature
Click Allow on the notification popup to access your location.
Under Selection Type, select Point, Line, or Polygon.
Draw the selected geometry on the map as indicated by the on-screen hint.
Select feature from the map.

description: Click 'Run Analysis' to generate the proximity analysis results.
Click 'Clear' to reset all selected parameters and start a new proximity analysis.
